question: Return the maximum final tables made across all poker players who have earnings below 200000.
gold_sql: SELECT max(Final_Table_Made) FROM poker_player WHERE Earnings  <  200000
predicted_sql: SELECT MAX(T1.col_5) FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_2 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_4 < 200000;
raw_response: SELECT MAX(T1.col_5) FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_2 AS T2 ON T1.col_2 = T2.col_1 WHERE T2.col_4 < 200000;
